description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU PIP Install + Test that tests the download and installation of FBGEMM_GPU nightly releases published to PyTorch PyPI. The workflow should trigger on a daily schedule and allow manual dispatch with inputs for PyTorch version, FBGEMM-GPU channel and version, and FBGEMM-GPU variant type. For each variant type (cpu, cuda, rocm), set up a container environment, install PyTorch and FBGEMM_GPU, and run tests with PyTest.
